splitNight.notes: Never approve both 95810 and 95811 at the same time. Prefer 95811 only if prior positive test or titration need is documented.

titrationAutoApproval.notes: Only approve 95811 automatically if one of these conditions is documented

diagnosticRouting.notes: If home keywords present, map to payer-aware HSAT code (G0399 for most payers, 95806 for Cigna/Sierra/Medicare FFS); if lab keywords, map to 95810

pediatricRouting.notes: Under 2 cannot test. Age 2-5 use pediatric codes (95782/95783). Age 6+ use adult codes. HST never allowed for pediatrics.

UnitedHealthcare.notes: UHC Medicare Advantage uses G0399 for HSAT

Nevada_Medicaid_FFS.notes: Nevada Medicaid FFS NEVER allows HST - always requires PSG

fallback.notes: If nothing else matches, default to in-lab diagnostic PSG
